steps.title: Establish the area conversion factor
steps.content:
Since $1 \text{ meter} = 3.28 \text{ feet}$, squaring both sides:
$$1 \text{ square meter} = (3.28)^2 = 10.7584 \text{ square feet}$$

steps.title: Convert the rate to square meters per minute
steps.content:
We need to convert both the area unit and the time unit.
$$250 \text{ sq ft/hr} \times \frac{1 \text{ m}^2}{10.7584 \text{ sq ft}} \times \frac{1 \text{ hr}}{60 \text{ min}} = \frac{250}{645.504} \approx 0.387 \text{ m}^2/\text{min}$$

Since $0.387$ is closest to $0.39$, that matches choice A — A is correct.
